title: Elbaf’s Warriors Turn Dark
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Brook, Hajrudin, Unknown person #15, World Government as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.text: gyaaahhh!! It's horrid!!

dialogue.text: Y-Your Highness?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's freaking me out!! What is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This thing can't possibly be mine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Your Highness, Please calm down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13

dialogue.text: Aaah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's cursed!! Just look at it!! It's a monster!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the prince of Elbaf stretched his arms into the air...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one was there to take those small hands in theirs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14

dialogue.text: It is said that the most...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: ...unfortunate souls...

dialogue.text: ...are those rejected from birth by their own mother...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen to me, no child was born today!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I for bid you from telling anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm returning to my village. I never want to give birth again...

dialogue.text: Your Highness!!'s Captain!!

dialogue.text: Soon after, Queen Estrid collapsed due to ill health.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: dispose of the child...
